location.office_time_required: at least 3 days per week (Mondays, Wednesdays, and Thursdays)

level_signals: 5+ years in program or project management
Individual contributor role with significant cross-functional reach
Base pay range $88,560-$110,700 consistent with mid-senior IC

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 5+ years in program or project management, with a demonstrated focus on process standardization, SOP governance, operational excellence, or a related discipline.
Proven ability to manage large-scale document libraries — including version control, audit cycles, and compliance validation — in a fast-paced operational environment.
Experience in fleet operations, transportation, logistics, AV, or a similarly regulated operational environment, with familiarity with safety management systems and field compliance requirements.
Strong analytical proficiency — comfortable building performance metrics and reporting frameworks, interpreting operational data, and using insights to drive continuous improvement decisions.
Demonstrated ability to lead cross-functional programs independently — defining milestones, managing risks, maintaining program health, and adapting to evolving business needs with minimal direction.
Excellent written communication skills — able to translate complex operational processes into clear, structured documentation and communicate updates effectively across a broad range of stakeholders.

explicitly_excluded: Candidates must reside in states registered for Flexdrive Services LLC

scope.surface: Flexdrive operational process library — SOP governance, field adherence, continuous improvement, CAPA lifecycle for AV depot operations
scope.business_model: B2B fleet management / AV infrastructure services (Lyft subsidiary)
primary_metrics_inferred: Process adherence rates across depot operations
Gap resolution velocity for partner procedure change requests
core_responsibilities: Own the full library of Flexdrive operational process standards — maintaining version control, ensuring document accuracy, and establishing governance practices
Design and execute regular audit cycles to validate that process standards reflect current operational reality
Manage the end-to-end lifecycle of process changes — from intake and review through approval, publication, and field communication
Build and maintain a structured feedback system that captures input from field teams, partners, and safety stakeholders
Lead retrospectives and post-mortems on process failures or near-misses; own the full CAPA lifecycle
Define clear success metrics for process adherence and standards health; build and maintain reporting frameworks
Own the formal procedure change request process with AV partners
Lead the process integration work required to onboard new AV partner standards

compensation.equity_form: potential equity offering mentioned but not detailed

green_flags: Clear ownership scope — 100+ process standards, well-defined product/program surface
Individual contributor role with genuine cross-functional autonomy described concretely
Growing AV infrastructure business with interesting domain (autonomous vehicles)
Hybrid schedule with defined in-office days gives predictability
red_flags: Candidates must reside in states registered for Flexdrive Services LLC — restricts geography beyond just Nashville but exact state list is not provided
Role title is Nashville-area specific for compensation range, but no other cities are listed — may be limited to a single location
Visa sponsorship status not addressed; work auth noted as unclear
No minimum education credential stated — may indicate unstated expectations not captured in JD

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from comp range + years required + IC framing)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not directly stated)
location.work_auth (inferred from state residency restriction language; no explicit sponsorship statement)
ambiguities: The JD states 'candidates must reside in states registered for Flexdrive Services LLC' but does not enumerate those states — geographic eligibility beyond Nashville is ambiguous.
Equity is mentioned as 'potential equity offering' without clarifying form (options vs. RSUs) or whether it is standard or discretionary.
No education credential is listed in requirements — unclear if a degree is assumed or genuinely not required.
